pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Builds on a SwiGLU base with value residuals, gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time training on validation tokens for evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs AdamW test-time training on validation tokens with bottom layers frozen before evaluation, restoring original weights afterward.
techniques: Per-layer value residuals and gated attention
Exclusive self-attention in final layers with EMA-tracked weights
AdamW-based test-time training on validation shards
